title: Payment validation crashes while selecting sanctions rule
symptoms: Card and bank-transfer payments remain pending because validation workers throw IndexOutOfBoundsException while evaluating risk decisions.
rootCause: The sanctions rule was removed from the rules-engine response but release 2.4.0 still read the third list item.
resolution: Changed validation to look up decisions by rule name, restored the contract test, and replayed pending payments.
content: Payment validation crashes while selecting sanctions rule. Service: transaction-validation-service. Symptoms: Card and bank-transfer payments remain pending because validation workers throw IndexOutOfBoundsException while evaluating risk decisions. Root cause: The sanctions rule was removed from the rules-engine response but release 2.4.0 still read the third list item. Resolution: Changed validation to look up decisions by rule name, restored the contract test, and replayed pending payments.

title: Ledger posting exhausts database connections
symptoms: Validated payments cannot be posted, ledger backlog grows, and the service reports database connection pool exhaustion.
rootCause: A retry connection was not released before the ledger insert, exhausting the small database pool.
resolution: Released retry connections in a finally block, raised the pool alert, and replayed the outbox backlog.
content: Ledger posting exhausts database connections. Service: ledger-posting-service. Symptoms: Validated payments cannot be posted, ledger backlog grows, and the service reports database connection pool exhaustion. Root cause: A retry connection was not released before the ledger insert, exhausting the small database pool. Resolution: Released retry connections in a finally block, raised the pool alert, and replayed the outbox backlog.

title: Payment initiation API returns gateway timeouts
symptoms: Customers receive 504 responses while initiating transfers and the downstream validation client connection pool is saturated.
rootCause: HTTP connections to validation workers were not returned after timeout retries.
resolution: Restarted affected pods, fixed response-body closure, and added connection-pool saturation alerts.
content: Payment initiation API returns gateway timeouts. Service: payment-initiation-api. Symptoms: Customers receive 504 responses while initiating transfers and the downstream validation client connection pool is saturated. Root cause: HTTP connections to validation workers were not returned after timeout retries. Resolution: Restarted affected pods, fixed response-body closure, and added connection-pool saturation alerts.

title: Customer onboarding KYC decisions delayed
symptoms: New account creation is delayed while KYC callbacks queue for more than fifteen minutes.
rootCause: The KYC provider rate limit was exceeded during a campaign.
resolution: Throttled onboarding requests, retried the callback backlog, and configured rate-limit backoff.
content: Customer onboarding KYC decisions delayed. Service: customer-onboarding-api. Symptoms: New account creation is delayed while KYC callbacks queue for more than fifteen minutes. Root cause: The KYC provider rate limit was exceeded during a campaign. Resolution: Throttled onboarding requests, retried the callback backlog, and configured rate-limit backoff.

title: Account balance reads are stale
symptoms: Customers see balances that do not include recently posted payments while the read replica lags.
rootCause: The account read replica was overloaded by an unbounded reporting query.
resolution: Routed critical reads to the primary, cancelled the query, and added replica lag thresholds.
content: Account balance reads are stale. Service: account-query-service. Symptoms: Customers see balances that do not include recently posted payments while the read replica lags. Root cause: The account read replica was overloaded by an unbounded reporting query. Resolution: Routed critical reads to the primary, cancelled the query, and added replica lag thresholds.

title: Regulatory settlement report generation delayed
symptoms: Daily settlement reports miss their delivery window and report job queue depth increases.
rootCause: A report worker had insufficient memory for a large settlement batch.
resolution: Increased worker memory, split batches, and added report-size limits.
content: Regulatory settlement report generation delayed. Service: regulatory-reporting-service. Symptoms: Daily settlement reports miss their delivery window and report job queue depth increases. Root cause: A report worker had insufficient memory for a large settlement batch. Resolution: Increased worker memory, split batches, and added report-size limits.
